3316650.name: Cozy Halloween
3316650.description:
Cozy Halloween is an engaging puzzle game, position the pieces correctly inside the shelf. On a rainy day, make some hot chocolate, snuggle up and solve fun puzzles.

There are 30 challenges spread across 3 different themed houses, put on your pajamas and come have fun!Cozy Halloween is an immersive puzzle game. On a rainy day, make yourself some hot chocolate, snuggle up, and solve fun puzzles.

There are 30 challenges spread across 3 different themed houses, put on your pajamas and come have fun!
3316650.supported_languages: 英语, 日语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
